Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Geneseo Migrant Center records, 1967-2019
Collection Number: 8743

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Geneseo Migrant Center records, 1967-2019
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
8743
Abstract:
Research reports, meeting minutes, curricula, newsletters, publications, memos, clippings, photographs, videos, and scrapbooks in binders, documenting the work done at the center.
Creator:
Geneseo Migrant Center
Quanitities:
125 cubic feet.
Content Description

Research reports, meeting minutes, curricula, newsletters, publications, memos, clippings, photographs, videos, and scrapbooks in binders, documenting the work done at the center.
Biographical / Historical

The Geneseo Migrant Center providing a variety of services to migrant farmworkers and their families as well as coordinating programs benefiting migrant workers on a regional, state, and national level. The center was formed in 1967 and closed in June of 2019.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Preferred Citation

Geneseo Migrant Center records, #8743. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Collection is closed for processing.

Names:
Geneseo Migrant Center

Migrant labor.

Migrant agricultural laborers -- United States.
Agricultural laborers -- United States
Labor camps -- New York (State).
Children of migrant laborers -- Education.
Labor laws and legislation.
Women -- Employment.
Working class women
Form and Genre Terms:
Videotapes.
Photographs
